calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating wider-seed sweep under StepHarness, Tier-1 diagnostic re-run after 514h manifest lost to mid-completion SIGTERM (supersedes V3-EXQ-514h)
items.note: Re-run of V3-EXQ-514h after the 514h manifest was lost to mid-completion SIGTERM at 17:32:00.5 on ree-cloud-1 (auto-scaler bug, since fixed). 514h's runner_status entry shows PASS but no metrics file. 514i recovers the metrics.
